NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-06-2003 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON AUG-06-2003 IN DEPT. 218 - SETT. CONF. HELD ON 06AUG2002; THE CAUSE SETTLES; TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD; GUADALUPE GAMINO, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; DEFENDANT APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; DEFENDANT TO VACATE PREMISES AT 1091 BUSH STREET, #503, S.F., CA 94109 ON OR BEFORE 31AUG2003; BACK RENT WAIVED THROUGH MONTH OF AUGUST 2003; SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE RETURNED TO DEFENDANT IF PREMISE VACATED ON OR BEFORE 31AUG03; RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 1091 BUSH STREET, #503, S.F.CA AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF; PREMISES SHALL BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION; ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED; RIGHT TO RECLAIM PROPERTY IS WAIVED; IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE BY 31AUG03 PLAINTIFF MAY PROCEED BY EX PARTE DECLARATION FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES; IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY 31AUG03, PLAINTIFF WILL MOVE TO DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE IF DEFENDANT AGREES TO ALL TERMS OF SETTLEMENT; PLAINTIFF COUNSEL GAMINO IS ORDERED TO PREPARE A WRITTEN STIPULATION RECITING THE TERMS OF CURRENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE: JPT PETER HADIARIS; REPORTER: PATTY VAN STEENBERGE, CSR; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D218/503-A, WED., 06AUG2003).
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-11-2003 - CASE SETTLED AT SETT CONF.
MINUTES FOR AUG-06-2003 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 218
